title: Xiaohongshu Food Step Cooking Infographic AI
sourceTitle: Xiaohongshu Food Step Cooking Infographic AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical Xiaohongshu-style step-by-step cooking infographic for stir-fried pork with chili peppers. Subject: stir-fried pork with chili peppers is explained through five large numbered steps: prep, marinate, sear, add peppers, glaze and serve, using thin pork slices, green chili peppers, garlic, scallions, soy sauce, and hot oil as the visible ingredient set and final appetizing dish. Scene: Clean kitchen or tabletop food-instruction layout with ingredient prep, cooking action, steam, sauce shine, chili color, and finished plating organized for social reading. Composition: Vertical image-text ratio with one clear title, five large numbered steps, ingredient close-ups, process panels, and final dish hero area; layout stays readable on mobile. Signature Elements: Preserved xiaohongshu food step cooking infographic source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Photorealistic food infographic with RedNote cookbook polish, real cooking texture, clean labels, appetizing oil sheen, and practical step-by-step clarity. Color Palette: Warm pork browns, green chili peppers, garlic whites, hot-oil gloss, soy-sauce amber, clean neutral background, and red/orange accents if needed. Lighting: Bright natural kitchen light with appetizing highlights on oil, pork, peppers, steam, and sauce glaze while keeping labels legible. Typography: one clear title plus five short step labels only; Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
